name: Precision Haircut
shortDescription: A tailored men's haircut with hot towel finish and styling consultation at our West Hollywood studio.

name: Beard Trim & Styling
shortDescription: Expert beard shaping and conditioning with premium grooming products at Austin's favorite barbershop.

name: Signature Blowout
shortDescription: Luxe shampoo, blow-dry, and style with volume and smoothness that lasts for days.

name: Brow Wax
shortDescription: Clean, defined brows using proprietary Comfort Wax for a virtually painless experience.

name: Full Body Wax Package
shortDescription: Complete waxing package including legs, arms, underarms, and bikini line with pre and post-care.

name: HydraFacial
shortDescription: Multi-step facial combining cleansing, exfoliation, extraction, and hydration with medical-grade serums.

name: CoolSculpting Session
shortDescription: FDA-cleared non-invasive body contouring that freezes and eliminates stubborn fat cells permanently.

name: Laser Tattoo Removal
shortDescription: Advanced PicoWay laser technology for safe, effective tattoo removal with minimal downtime.

name: Sculpt & Tone Facial
shortDescription: Signature workout for your face using kneading, knuckling, and sculpting techniques with electrical muscle stimulation.

name: Balayage & Highlights
shortDescription: Hand-painted balayage or precision foil highlights with toner, gloss treatment, and blowout finish.

name: Deluxe Pedicure
shortDescription: Extended soak, exfoliation, callus care, massage, and polish in a clean, modern environment.

name: Men's Grooming Package
shortDescription: The complete experience — precision cut, beard trim, hot towel shave, and scalp massage.

name: Swedish Massage
shortDescription: Classic full-body massage with long, flowing strokes to ease tension and promote deep relaxation.

name: Express Facial
shortDescription: A quick but effective facial workout with cleansing, massage, and LED light therapy.

name: Botox & Filler Consultation
shortDescription: One-on-one consultation to discuss injectable treatment areas, goals, and a personalized treatment plan.

name: Gel Manicure
shortDescription: Long-lasting gel polish with nail shaping, cuticle care, and a chip-resistant finish.
